title: Civil Aviation Authority investigating West Coast Airshow crash
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS AND VIDEO - The...
bodyText:
Video

GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS AND VIDEO - The Civil Aviation Authority’s Accident and Incident Investigations Division (AIID) confirmed that they are investigating the crash of an Impala aeroplane at the West Coast Airshow yesterday afternoon.


> The crash occurred during a live demonstration at the airshow yesterday afternoon, shocking onlookers.


The AIID said the crash site has been secured pending the arrival of the investigation team.

The division said it will provide a public update from the scene if it is deemed necessary.

VIDEO: Jean Oosthuizen | Facebook

Article: Caxton Network News

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
